creator: admin@pyramida.pl.ua
text:
After upgrading ports spamass-milter does not work.
Installed from ports:
p5-Mail-SpamAssassin-3.2.5
spamass-milter-0.3.1_7
sendmail-8.14.3
CMD Error:
Starting spamass_milter.
chown: /var/run/spamass-milter.sock: No such file or directory
chmod: /var/run/spamass-milter.sock: No such file or directory
Loging Error:
Aug  5 19:55:59 pyramida spamass-milter[29742]: SpamAssassin: smfi_register: version mismatch application: 16777217 != milter: 16777216
